get.description: Fetches market data with optional filtering and search functionality. Supports filtering by market slug, condition ID, token ID, or tags, as well as fuzzy search across market titles and descriptions. Returns markets ordered by volume (most popular first) when filters are applied, or by start_time (most recent first) when no filters are provided.

parameters.name: market_slug
parameters.description: Filter markets by market slug(s). Can provide multiple values.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets with these slugs; a slug is the market's URL identifier. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
x-doc.title_zh: 按市场 slug（市场的 URL 标识）筛选，可重复传入多个值。

parameters.name: event_slug
parameters.description: Filter markets by event slug(s). Can provide multiple values.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets belonging to events with these slugs. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
x-doc.title_zh: 按所属事件的 slug 筛选，可重复传入多个值。

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Filter markets by condition ID(s). Can provide multiple values.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets with these on-chain condition IDs. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
x-doc.title_zh: 按市场链上 condition ID 筛选，可重复传入多个值。

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: Filter markets by token ID(s). Matches markets where the token_id is either the primary_token_id or secondary_token_id. Can provide multiple values (maximum 100). Each token_id must be a numeric string.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets whose primary or secondary outcome token matches these token IDs. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
x-doc.title_zh: 按结果 token ID 筛选，命中市场的 primary 或 secondary token 即返回，可重复传入多个值。

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter markets by tag(s). Can provide multiple values.

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets carrying these category tags. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
x-doc.title_zh: 按市场所带的分类标签筛选，可重复传入多个值。

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search markets by keywords in title and description. Must be URL encoded (e.g., 'bitcoin%20price' for 'bitcoin price').

x-doc.desc_en: Fuzzy keyword search across market titles and descriptions; the value must be URL-encoded. Cannot be combined with other filter parameters.
x-doc.title_zh: 对市场标题与描述做模糊关键词搜索，取值需 URL 编码；不可与其他筛选参数同时使用。

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter markets by status (whether they're open or closed)

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to markets that are currently open or already closed.
x-doc.title_zh: 按市场当前是开放还是已关闭筛选。

parameters.name: min_volume
parameters.description: Filter markets with total trading volume greater than or equal to this amount (USD)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return markets whose total trading volume (in USD) is at least this amount.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回累计成交量（美元）不低于该值的市场。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of markets to return (1-100). Default: 10 for search, 10 for regular queries.

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of markets to return in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页最多返回的市场数量。

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for efficient pagination. Returned in the previous response's pagination object. Use this instead of large offsets for better performance.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back the value from the previous response's pagination object. Preferred over large offsets for performance.
x-doc.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应 pagination 中的值；相比大偏移量更高效。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Filter markets from this Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return markets at or after this start time, given as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回开始时间不早于此刻的市场，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Filter markets until this Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return markets at or before this time, given as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回时间不晚于此刻的市场，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

x-doc.desc_en: URL identifier of the market.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场的 URL 标识。

event_slug.description: The event slug this market belongs to, or null if not associated with an event

x-doc.desc_en: Slug of the event this market belongs to; null when the market is not part of an event.
x-doc.title_zh: 该市场所属事件的 slug；不属于任何事件时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: On-chain condition ID identifying the market.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识该市场的链上 condition ID。

title.example: Bitcoin Up or Down - November 7, 7:00AM-7:15AM ET

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable market question or title.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场的可读问题或标题。

start_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market starts

x-doc.desc_en: When trading on the market opens, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场开盘时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market ends

x-doc.desc_en: When trading on the market ends, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场结束时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

completed_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market was completed

x-doc.desc_en: When the market was completed, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; null if not yet completed.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场完成时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；尚未完成时为 null。

close_time.description: Unix timestamp in seconds when the market was closed

x-doc.desc_en: When the market was closed, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; null if still open.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场关闭时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仍开放时为 null。

game_start_time.description: Datetime string in UTC format (YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS.000) for when the game/event starts. Only present for sports markets that have a game start time.

x-doc.desc_en: For sports markets, the UTC datetime when the underlying game starts; null otherwise.
x-doc.title_zh: 体育类市场中对应赛事的开始时间（UTC）；非体育市场为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: Category tags attached to the market.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场所带的分类标签。

volume_1_week.description: Trading volume in USD for the past week

x-doc.desc_en: Trading volume over the past week, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 过去一周的成交量（美元）。

volume_1_month.description: Trading volume in USD for the past month

x-doc.desc_en: Trading volume over the past month, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 过去一个月的成交量（美元）。

volume_1_year.description: Trading volume in USD for the past year

x-doc.desc_en: Trading volume over the past year, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 过去一年的成交量（美元）。

x-doc.desc_en: Cumulative trading volume since inception, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 自创建以来的累计成交量（美元）。

resolution_source.description: URL to the data source used for market resolution

x-doc.desc_en: URL of the data source used to resolve the market outcome.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于裁定市场结果的数据源 URL。

x-doc.desc_en: URL of the market's display image.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场展示图片的 URL。

description.description: Detailed description of the market, or null if no description is available
description.example: This market resolves to "Yes" if Bitcoin's price increases from the start to the end of the 15-minute window, and "No" otherwise.

x-doc.desc_en: Detailed market description including resolution criteria; null when unavailable.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场的详细描述（含裁定标准）；无内容时为 null。

negative_risk_id.description: Negative risk identifier for the market, or null if not applicable

x-doc.desc_en: Identifier linking related mutually-exclusive markets under a negative-risk group; null when not applicable.
x-doc.title_zh: 将互斥相关市场归入 negative-risk 组的标识；不适用时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: Outcome token ID for side A.
x-doc.title_zh: side A 的结果 token ID。

x-doc.desc_en: Display label for side A's outcome.
x-doc.title_zh: side A 结果的展示标签。

x-doc.desc_en: The first of the two market outcomes.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场两个结果中的第一个。

x-doc.desc_en: Outcome token ID for side B.
x-doc.title_zh: side B 的结果 token ID。

x-doc.desc_en: Display label for side B's outcome.
x-doc.title_zh: side B 结果的展示标签。

x-doc.desc_en: The second of the two market outcomes.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场两个结果中的第二个。

winning_side.description: The winning side of the market (null if not yet resolved)

x-doc.desc_en: The outcome that won once resolved; null until the market is resolved.
x-doc.title_zh: 裁定后的获胜结果；未裁定前为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the market is currently open or closed.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场当前为开放还是已关闭。

extra_fields.description: Additional market-specific fields as a map of key-value pairs. For updown markets (markets with slugs containing '-updown-15m-', '-up-or-down-', or '-updown-4h-'), this object includes 'price_to_beat' and 'final_price' fields. Empty object if no extra fields are present.

x-doc.desc_en: Map of market-specific extra fields; for up/down markets it includes price_to_beat and final_price. Empty when none apply.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场专有的附加字段映射；涨跌（up/down）类市场含 price_to_beat 与 final_price。无附加字段时为空对象。

x-doc.desc_en: The list of markets matching the query.
x-doc.title_zh: 匹配查询条件的市场列表。

x-doc.desc_en: The page size applied to this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次响应采用的页大小。

total.description: Total number of markets matching the filters

x-doc.desc_en: Total number of markets matching the filters across all pages.
x-doc.title_zh: 所有页中匹配筛选条件的市场总数。

has_more.description: Whether there are more markets available

x-doc.desc_en: Whether further pages of results are available.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否还有更多结果页可取。

pagination_key.description: Cursor for next page. Only present when has_more is true and using cursor-based pagination.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor to request the next page; present only when has_more is true under cursor pagination.
x-doc.title_zh: 请求下一页的游标；仅在游标分页且 has_more 为 true 时出现。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.
x-doc.title_zh: 结果集的分页元信息。

400.description: Bad Request - Invalid parameters or validation errors

x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.example: search must be at least 2 characters long

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
x-doc.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

value.message: search must be at least 2 characters long
search parameter cannot be used with other filter parameters
limit must be a number between 1 and 100

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询预测市场列表 get_polymarket-markets
x-doc.desc_en: List prediction markets with optional filtering (by slug, condition ID, token ID, tags, status, volume, time range) and keyword search. Results are ordered by volume when filters are applied, or by start time otherwise, and paginated via a cursor.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询预测市场列表，支持按 slug、condition ID、token ID、标签、状态、成交量、时间范围筛选及关键词搜索。施加筛选时按成交量排序，否则按开始时间排序，并以游标分页。

get.description:
Fetches events (groups of related markets) with optional filtering by event_slug, tags/categories and status. Events aggregate multiple markets under a single topic (e.g., 'Presidential Election 2024' contains multiple candidate markets). Returns events ordered by total volume (most popular first).

**Example Request (single event by slug):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/polymarket/events?event_slug=presidential-election-winner-2024&include_markets=true'
```

**Example Request (filter by tags):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/polymarket/events?tags=sports&status=open&limit=10'
```

**Example Request (with markets included):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/polymarket/events?include_markets=true&limit=5'
```

parameters.name: event_slug
parameters.description: Filter by specific event slug. When provided, returns a single hydrated event matching that slug (e.g., 'presidential-election-winner-2024'). Use with include_markets=true to get the full event with all its markets.

x-doc.desc_en: Return the single event matching this slug; combine with include_markets=true to also embed its markets.
x-doc.title_zh: 返回与该 slug 匹配的单个事件；配合 include_markets=true 可一并内嵌其市场。

parameters.name: tags
parameters.description: Filter events by tag(s)/category. Can provide multiple values (e.g., sports, crypto, politics).

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict results to events carrying these category tags. Repeat the parameter for multiple values.
x-doc.title_zh: 按事件所带的分类标签筛选，可重复传入多个值。

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter events by status. An event is 'open' if any of its markets are still open, 'closed' if all markets are closed.

x-doc.desc_en: Filter by event status; an event is open if any of its markets is open, otherwise closed.
x-doc.title_zh: 按事件状态筛选；只要有一个市场开放即视为 open，全部关闭则为 closed。

parameters.name: include_markets
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to include the list of markets for each event in the response.

x-doc.desc_en: Pass true to embed the full list of markets within each returned event.
x-doc.title_zh: 传 true 时在每个返回事件中内嵌其完整市场列表。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Filter events starting after this Unix timestamp (seconds)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return events starting at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回开始时间不早于此刻的事件，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Filter events starting before this Unix timestamp (seconds)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return events starting at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回开始时间不晚于此刻的事件，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: game_start_time
parameters.description: Filter events by game start time (Unix timestamp in seconds). Useful for filtering sports events by when the game starts.

x-doc.desc_en: Filter sports events by when the underlying game starts, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 按对应赛事开始时间筛选体育类事件，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of events to return (1-100). Default: 10.

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of events to return in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页最多返回的事件数量。

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Pagination key for cursor-based pagination. Use the value from the previous response's pagination.pagination_key field to get the next page of results. Do not use the deprecated 'offset' parameter.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back pagination.pagination_key from the previous response. Do not use the deprecated offset parameter.
x-doc.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应的 pagination.pagination_key；请勿使用已废弃的 offset 参数。

x-doc.desc_en: URL identifier uniquely naming the event.
x-doc.title_zh: 唯一标识事件的 URL slug。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable event title.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件的可读标题。

subtitle.example: Who will win the 2024 US Presidential Election?

x-doc.desc_en: Optional subtitle or short description of the event; null when absent.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件的副标题或简短描述；无则为 null。

status.description: Event status - 'open' if any market is open, 'closed' if all markets are closed

x-doc.desc_en: Aggregate event status: open if any market is open, closed if all are closed.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件的聚合状态：有任一市场开放为 open，全部关闭为 closed。

start_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the event started

x-doc.desc_en: When the event started, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件开始时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

end_time.description: Unix timestamp (seconds) when the event ends

x-doc.desc_en: When the event ends, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件结束时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

x-doc.title_zh: 事件下所有市场的总成交量（美元）。

x-doc.desc_en: Source used to settle/resolve the event; null when unspecified.
x-doc.title_zh: 用于结算/裁定事件的来源；未指定时为 null。

rules_url.description: URL to the event rules (if available)

x-doc.desc_en: Link to the event's rules; null when unavailable.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件规则的链接；无则为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: URL of the event's display image; null when none.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件展示图片的 URL；无则为 null。

tags.description: Array of category tags for the event

x-doc.desc_en: Category tags attached to the event.
x-doc.title_zh: 事件所带的分类标签。

market_count.description: Number of markets in this event

x-doc.desc_en: Number of markets grouped under this event.
x-doc.title_zh: 该事件下聚合的市场数量。

markets.description: List of markets in this event (only included when include_markets=true)

x-doc.desc_en: URL identifier of the embedded market.
x-doc.title_zh: 内嵌市场的 URL 标识。

x-doc.desc_en: Title of the embedded market.
x-doc.title_zh: 内嵌市场的标题。

x-doc.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the embedded market.
x-doc.title_zh: 内嵌市场的链上 condition ID。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the embedded market is open or closed.
x-doc.title_zh: 内嵌市场为开放还是已关闭。

x-doc.desc_en: Cumulative trading volume of the embedded market, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 内嵌市场的累计成交量（美元）。

x-doc.desc_en: Markets belonging to this event; populated only when include_markets=true.
x-doc.title_zh: 该事件下的市场；仅在 include_markets=true 时填充。

x-doc.desc_en: The list of events matching the query.
x-doc.title_zh: 匹配查询条件的事件列表。

limit.description: Number of events returned in this response

x-doc.desc_en: Number of events returned in this response.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次响应返回的事件数量。

has_more.description: Whether there are more events available. If true, use pagination_key to fetch the next page.

x-doc.desc_en: Whether further pages are available; if true, use pagination_key to continue.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否还有更多页；为 true 时用 pagination_key 继续翻页。

pagination_key.description: Pagination key for fetching the next page. Pass this value as the pagination_key query parameter to get the next page of results. Will be null if has_more is false.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor to fetch the next page; null when has_more is false.
x-doc.title_zh: 获取下一页的游标；has_more 为 false 时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the result set.
x-doc.title_zh: 结果集的分页元信息。

x-doc.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
x-doc.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

value.message: status must be 'open' or 'closed'
limit must be a number between 1 and 100
offset must be a non-negative number

x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.

x-doc.desc_en: List events, which group related markets under a single topic, with optional filtering by event slug, tags, status, and time range. Optionally embeds each event's markets when include_markets is enabled. Results are ordered by total volume and paginated via a cursor.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询事件列表。事件将相关市场聚合到同一主题下，支持按事件 slug、标签、状态、时间范围筛选；开启 include_markets 时内嵌各事件的市场。结果按总成交量排序并以游标分页。

get.description: Fetches order data with optional filtering by market, condition, token, time range, and user. Returns orders that match either primary or secondary token IDs for markets. If no filters provided, fetches the latest trades happening in real-time. Only one of market_slug, token_id, or condition_id can be provided.

parameters.name: market_slug
parameters.description: Filter orders by market slug

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict orders to a single market identified by its slug. Mutually exclusive with token_id and condition_id.
x-doc.title_zh: 按市场 slug 限定订单，与 token_id、condition_id 互斥。

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Filter orders by condition ID

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict orders to a single market identified by its on-chain condition ID. Mutually exclusive with market_slug and token_id.
x-doc.title_zh: 按链上 condition ID 限定订单，与 market_slug、token_id 互斥。

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: Filter orders by token ID

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict orders to those touching this outcome token ID. Mutually exclusive with market_slug and condition_id.
x-doc.title_zh: 按结果 token ID 限定订单，与 market_slug、condition_id 互斥。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Filter orders from this Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return orders placed at or after this Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回下单时间不早于此刻的订单，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Filter orders until this Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return orders placed at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 仅返回下单时间不晚于此刻的订单，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of orders to return (1-1000)

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of orders to return in this page.
x-doc.title_zh: 本页最多返回的订单数量。

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Base64-encoded cursor for efficient pagination. Returned in the previous response's pagination object.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor for the next page; pass back the value from the previous response's pagination object.
x-doc.title_zh: 翻页游标，回传上一页响应 pagination 中的值。

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: Filter orders by user (wallet address)

x-doc.desc_en: Restrict orders to those made by this user wallet address.
x-doc.title_zh: 按用户钱包地址限定订单。

x-doc.desc_en: Outcome token ID this order traded.
x-doc.title_zh: 该订单交易的结果 token ID。

token_label.description: Human readable label for this outcome (yes/no etc)

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable label of the traded outcome (e.g. Yes/No).
x-doc.title_zh: 所交易结果的可读标签（如 Yes/No）。

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the order bought or sold the outcome token.
x-doc.title_zh: 该订单是买入还是卖出结果 token。

x-doc.desc_en: Slug of the market the order belongs to.
x-doc.title_zh: 订单所属市场的 slug。

x-doc.desc_en: On-chain condition ID of the order's market.
x-doc.title_zh: 订单所属市场的链上 condition ID。

shares.description: Raw number of shares purchased (from the blockchain)

x-doc.desc_en: Raw share quantity as recorded on-chain (before normalization).

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询订单成交记录 get_polymarket-orders
x-doc.desc_en: List on-chain order/trade records, optionally filtered by market, condition, token, user wallet, and time range. With no filters it returns the latest real-time trades. Only one of market_slug, token_id, or condition_id may be supplied.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询链上订单/成交记录，可按市场、condition、token、用户钱包及时间范围筛选；不传筛选时返回最新的实时成交。market_slug、token_id、condition_id 三者只能择一传入。

get.description: Fetches historical orderbook snapshots for a specific asset (token ID) over a specified time range. If no start_time and end_time are provided, returns the latest orderbook snapshot for the market. Returns snapshots of the order book including bids, asks, and market metadata in order. All timestamps are in milliseconds. Orderbook data has history starting from October 14th, 2025. Note: When fetching the latest orderbook (without start/end times), the limit and pagination_key parameters are ignored.

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: The token id (asset) for the Polymarket market

x-doc.desc_en: The outcome token (asset) whose order book snapshots are requested.
x-doc.title_zh: 待查询订单簿快照的结果 token（资产）。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Start time in Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Optional - if not provided along with end_time, returns the latest orderbook snapshot.

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds; omit together with end_time to get the latest snapshot only.
x-doc.title_zh: 时间范围起点，Unix 时间戳（毫秒）；与 end_time 一并省略时仅取最新快照。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: End time in Unix timestamp (milliseconds). Optional - if not provided along with start_time, returns the latest orderbook snapshot.

x-doc.desc_en: End of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in milliseconds; omit together with start_time to get the latest snapshot only.
x-doc.title_zh: 时间范围终点，Unix 时间戳（毫秒）；与 start_time 一并省略时仅取最新快照。

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of snapshots to return (default: 100, max: 200). Ignored when fetching the latest orderbook without start_time and end_time.

x-doc.desc_en: Maximum number of snapshots to return; ignored when fetching only the latest snapshot.
x-doc.title_zh: 最多返回的快照数量；仅取最新快照时忽略该参数。

parameters.name: pagination_key
parameters.description: Pagination key to get the next chunk of data. Ignored when fetching the latest orderbook without start_time and end_time.

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor for the next chunk of snapshots; ignored when fetching only the latest snapshot.
x-doc.title_zh: 获取下一批快照的游标；仅取最新快照时忽略该参数。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询历史订单簿快照 get_polymarket-orderbooks
x-doc.desc_en: Fetch historical order book snapshots for an outcome token over a time range; when no time range is given, returns only the latest snapshot. Each snapshot contains bids, asks, and market metadata. All timestamps are in milliseconds.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询某结果 token 在指定时间范围内的历史订单簿快照；不传时间范围时仅返回最新一份快照。每份快照包含买单、卖单及市场元数据，所有时间戳均为毫秒。

get.description: Fetches activity data with optional filtering by user, market, condition, and time range. Returns trading activity including `MERGES`, `SPLITS`, and `REDEEMS`. Supports efficient cursor-based pagination for large datasets.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: User wallet address to fetch activity for. If not provided, returns activity for all users.

x-doc.desc_en: Wallet address whose activity to return; omit to return activity across all users.

parameters.name: start_time

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Filter activity until this Unix timestamp in seconds (inclusive)

x-doc.desc_en: Only return activity at or before this Unix timestamp in seconds.

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询账户活动记录 get_polymarket-activity
x-doc.desc_en: List on-chain account activity (merges, splits, and redeems), optionally filtered by user wallet, market, condition, and time range, with cursor-based pagination.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询链上账户活动（合并 MERGE、拆分 SPLIT、赎回 REDEEM），可按用户钱包、市场、condition 及时间范围筛选，并支持游标分页。

parameters.name: token_id
parameters.description: The token ID for the Polymarket market

get.description:
Fetches the current market price for a market by `token_id`. When `at_time` is not provided, returns the most real-time price available. When `at_time` is provided, returns the historical market price at that specific timestamp.

**Example Request (with historical timestamp):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/polymarket/market-price/19701256321759583954581192053894521654935987478209343000964756587964612528044?at_time=1762164600'
```

**Example Request (real-time price):**
```bash
curl 'https://api.aisa.one/apis/v1/polymarket/market-price/19701256321759583954581192053894521654935987478209343000964756587964612528044'
```

parameters.name: at_time
parameters.description: Optional Unix timestamp (in seconds) to fetch a historical market price. If not provided, returns the most real-time price available.

x-doc.desc_en: Unix timestamp in seconds at which to read the historical price; omit to get the most real-time price.
x-doc.title_zh: 读取历史价格的时间点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；省略则返回最实时的价格。

x-doc.desc_en: The market price of the outcome token, expressed as a probability between 0 and 1.
x-doc.title_zh: 该结果 token 的市场价格，以 0 到 1 之间的概率表示。

at_time.description: The timestamp for which the price was fetched (Unix timestamp in seconds)

x-doc.desc_en: The timestamp the returned price corresponds to, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 返回价格所对应的时间点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

real_time.description: Response when `at_time` parameter is omitted (most recent price)

x-doc.desc_en: Details of the winning outcome once the market is closed; null while open or undetermined.

x-doc.desc_en: Market start time, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.

x-doc.desc_en: Market end time, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 市场结束时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

completed_time.description: Market completion timestamp (Unix seconds), currently always null

x-doc.title_zh: 市场完成时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；未完成时为 null。

close_time.description: Market close timestamp (Unix seconds) if market is closed, null if still open

x-doc.title_zh: 市场关闭时间，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仍开放时为 null。

game_start_time.description: Game start time for sports markets, null for non-sports markets

x-doc.title_zh: 体育类市场的赛事开始时间；非体育市场为 null。

market_status.description: Whether the market is open or closed

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the position's market is open or closed.
x-doc.title_zh: 持仓所属市场为开放还是已关闭。

negativeRisk.description: Whether this market has negative risk

x-doc.desc_en: Whether the position's market is part of a negative-risk group.
x-doc.title_zh: 持仓所属市场是否属于 negative-risk 组。

x-doc.desc_en: The wallet's position entries.
x-doc.title_zh: 该钱包的持仓条目。

has_more.description: Whether there are more results available

x-doc.desc_en: Whether more positions are available.
x-doc.title_zh: 是否还有更多持仓可取。

limit.description: The limit used for this request

x-doc.desc_en: The page size applied to this request.
x-doc.title_zh: 本次请求采用的页大小。

pagination_key.description: Pagination key to use for fetching next page, null if no more pages

x-doc.desc_en: Cursor to fetch the next page; null when there are no more pages.
x-doc.title_zh: 获取下一页的游标；无更多页时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: Pagination metadata for the positions.
x-doc.title_zh: 持仓结果的分页元信息。

with_positions.description: Response when wallet has active positions

positions.title: Will Bitcoin reach $100k by end of 2025?
positions.label: Yes

empty_positions.description: Response when wallet has no positions >= 10,000 shares

x-doc.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.example: wallet_address must be a valid Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.

value.message: wallet_address is required
wallet_address must be a valid Ethereum address (0x followed by 40 hex characters)
limit must be a number between 1 and 100

x-doc.desc_en: List all Polymarket positions held by a proxy wallet, including per-position market info. Only positions with a balance of at least 10,000 raw shares (0.01 normalized) are returned, with cursor-based pagination.
x-doc.description_zh: 查询某代理钱包持有的全部 Polymarket 持仓，含每个持仓的市场信息。仅返回余额不低于 10,000 原始份额（归一化 0.01）的持仓，并支持游标分页。

get.description: Fetches wallet information by providing either an EOA (Externally Owned Account) address, a proxy wallet address, or a user handle. Returns the associated EOA, proxy, wallet type, handle, pseudonym, and profile image. Optionally returns trading metrics when `with_metrics=true`.

parameters.name: eoa
parameters.description: EOA (Externally Owned Account) wallet address. Either `eoa`, `proxy`, or `handle` must be provided, but not more than one.

x-doc.desc_en: Externally owned account address to look up. Provide exactly one of eoa, proxy, or handle.
x-doc.title_zh: 待查询的外部账户（EOA）地址。eoa、proxy、handle 三者须且仅须提供其一。

parameters.name: proxy
parameters.description: Proxy wallet address. Either `eoa`, `proxy`, or `handle` must be provided, but not more than one.

x-doc.desc_en: Proxy wallet address to look up. Provide exactly one of eoa, proxy, or handle.
x-doc.title_zh: 待查询的代理钱包地址。eoa、proxy、handle 三者须且仅须提供其一。

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: User handle/username. Accepts both formats: `username` or `@username` (the @ prefix will be automatically stripped). Either `eoa`, `proxy`, or `handle` must be provided, but not more than one.

x-doc.desc_en: User handle to look up; an optional leading @ is stripped automatically. Provide exactly one of eoa, proxy, or handle.
x-doc.title_zh: 待查询的用户 handle，开头的 @ 会被自动去除。eoa、proxy、handle 三者须且仅须提供其一。

parameters.name: with_metrics
parameters.description: Whether to include wallet trading metrics (total volume, trades, and markets). Pass `true` to include metrics. Metrics are computed only when explicitly requested for performance reasons.

x-doc.desc_en: Pass true to also compute and return trading metrics; they are calculated only on demand for performance.
x-doc.title_zh: 传 true 时额外计算并返回交易指标；出于性能考虑仅按需计算。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Optional start date for metrics calculation (Unix timestamp in seconds). Only used when `with_metrics=true`.

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the window for metric calculation, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; only used when with_metrics=true.
x-doc.title_zh: 指标计算窗口的起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仅在 with_metrics=true 时生效。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Optional end date for metrics calculation (Unix timestamp in seconds). Only used when `with_metrics=true`.

x-doc.desc_en: End of the window for metric calculation, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; only used when with_metrics=true.
x-doc.title_zh: 指标计算窗口的终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；仅在 with_metrics=true 时生效。

eoa.description: The EOA (Externally Owned Account) wallet address

x-doc.desc_en: The resolved externally owned account address.
x-doc.title_zh: 解析得到的外部账户（EOA）地址。

x-doc.desc_en: The resolved proxy wallet address.
x-doc.title_zh: 解析得到的代理钱包地址。

x-doc.desc_en: The wallet implementation type.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包的实现类型。

x-doc.desc_en: The user's handle; null when none is set.
x-doc.title_zh: 用户 handle；未设置时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: The user's display pseudonym; null when none is set.
x-doc.title_zh: 用户的展示化名；未设置时为 null。

x-doc.desc_en: URL of the user's profile image; null when none is set.
x-doc.title_zh: 用户头像的 URL；未设置时为 null。

wallet_metrics.description: Trading metrics for this wallet (only present when with_metrics=true)

x-doc.desc_en: Total trading volume of the wallet, in USD.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包的总交易额（美元）。

total_trades.description: Total number of trades (orders where this wallet was the maker)

x-doc.desc_en: Total number of trades where this wallet was the maker.
x-doc.title_zh: 该钱包作为 maker 的总成交笔数。

total_markets.description: Total number of unique markets traded in

x-doc.desc_en: Number of distinct markets the wallet has traded in.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包参与交易的不同市场数量。

highest_volume_day.description: The day with the highest number of shares traded

x-doc.desc_en: Calendar date of the highest-volume day.
x-doc.title_zh: 成交量最高那一天的日期。

volume.description: Total shares traded on that day (normalized, divided by 1,000,000)

x-doc.desc_en: Shares traded that day, normalized (raw value scaled down by 1,000,000).
x-doc.title_zh: 当日成交份额，归一化值（原始值除以 1,000,000）。

trades.description: Number of trades executed on that day

x-doc.desc_en: Number of trades executed that day.
x-doc.title_zh: 当日执行的成交笔数。

x-doc.desc_en: The single day with the highest traded share volume.
x-doc.title_zh: 成交份额最高的单日。

merges.description: Total number of token merges performed by this wallet

x-doc.desc_en: Total token merges performed by the wallet.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 合并总次数。

splits.description: Total number of token splits performed by this wallet

x-doc.desc_en: Total token splits performed by the wallet.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 拆分总次数。

conversions.description: Total number of token conversions performed by this wallet

x-doc.desc_en: Total token conversions performed by the wallet.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 转换总次数。

redemptions.description: Total number of token redemptions performed by this wallet

x-doc.desc_en: Total token redemptions performed by the wallet.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包执行的 token 赎回总次数。

x-doc.desc_en: Trading metrics for the wallet; present only when with_metrics=true.
x-doc.title_zh: 钱包的交易指标；仅在 with_metrics=true 时出现。

without_metrics.description: Response when with_metrics is not provided or false

x-doc.desc_en: Look up wallet information by EOA address, proxy address, or user handle, returning the associated EOA, proxy, wallet type, handle, pseudonym, and profile image. Trading metrics are included only when with_metrics=true.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 EOA 地址、代理地址或用户 handle 查询钱包信息，返回关联的 EOA、代理、钱包类型、handle、化名与头像。仅当 with_metrics=true 时附带交易指标。

get.description: Fetches historical candlestick data for a market identified by `condition_id`, over a specified interval.

parameters.name: condition_id
parameters.description: Polymarket condition ID for the market.

x-doc.desc_en: On-chain condition ID identifying the market to fetch candlesticks for.
x-doc.title_zh: 待查询 K 线的市场链上 condition ID。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) for start of time range

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 时间范围起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Unix timestamp (in seconds) for end of time range

x-doc.desc_en: End of the time range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 时间范围终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

parameters.name: interval
parameters.description:
Interval length: 1 = 1m, 60 = 1h, 1440 = 1d. Defaults to 1m. 

⚠️ **Note:** There are range limits for `interval` — specifically:
- `1` (1m): max range **1 week**
- `60` (1h): max range **1 month**
- `1440` (1d): max range **1 year**

x-doc.desc_en: Candle granularity in minutes (1 = 1m, 60 = 1h, 1440 = 1d); each granularity caps the allowed range (1m up to 1 week, 1h up to 1 month, 1d up to 1 year).
x-doc.title_zh: K 线粒度（按分钟：1 = 1 分钟，60 = 1 小时，1440 = 1 天）；各粒度有最大范围限制（1 分钟至多 1 周，1 小时至多 1 个月，1 天至多 1 年）。

candlesticks.description: Array of market candlestick data, where each element is a tuple containing candlestick data array and token metadata

side.description: The outcome label for this token (e.g., 'Yes', 'No', 'Up', 'Down', 'Over', 'Under', or team names for sports markets)

x-doc.desc_en: Per-outcome candlestick series; each element pairs a candlestick data array with that token's metadata (token_id and outcome label).
x-doc.title_zh: 按结果划分的 K 线序列；每个元素由一段 K 线数据数组与该 token 的元数据（token_id 与结果标签）配对组成。

x-doc.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

x-doc.desc_en: Names of the required parameters that were missing from the request.
x-doc.title_zh: 请求中缺失的必填参数名称。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询 K 线数据 get_polymarket-candlesticks
x-doc.desc_en: Fetch historical candlestick (OHLC) data for a market identified by condition_id over a time range, at a 1-minute, 1-hour, or 1-day interval. Each interval enforces a maximum lookback range.
x-doc.description_zh: 按 condition_id 查询某市场在指定时间范围内的历史 K 线（OHLC）数据，可选 1 分钟、1 小时或 1 天的时间粒度。不同粒度有各自的最大回溯范围限制。

get.description: Fetches the REALIZED profit and loss (PnL) for a specific wallet address over a specified time range and granularity. **Note:** This will differ to what you see on Polymarket's dashboard since Polymarket showcases historical unrealized PnL. This API tracks realized gains only - from either confirmed sells or redeems. We do not realize a gain/loss until a finished market is redeemed.

parameters.name: wallet_address
parameters.description: Polymarket wallet address (0x-prefixed).

x-doc.desc_en: The 0x-prefixed wallet address to compute PnL for.
x-doc.title_zh: 待计算盈亏的 0x 前缀钱包地址。

x-doc.desc_en: Time bucket size for the PnL series (day, week, month, year, or the whole period).
x-doc.title_zh: 盈亏序列的时间分桶粒度（日、周、月、年或全部时段）。

parameters.name: start_time
parameters.description: Defaults to first day of first trade if not provided.

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; defaults to the day of the wallet's first trade when omitted.
x-doc.title_zh: 范围起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；省略时默认取该钱包首笔交易当日。

parameters.name: end_time
parameters.description: Defaults to the current date if not provided.

x-doc.desc_en: End of the range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds; defaults to the current date when omitted.
x-doc.title_zh: 范围终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）；省略时默认取当前日期。

x-doc.desc_en: The time bucket size applied to the returned series.
x-doc.title_zh: 返回序列采用的时间分桶粒度。

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the computed range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 实际计算范围的起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

x-doc.desc_en: End of the computed range, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 实际计算范围的终点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

x-doc.desc_en: The wallet address the PnL was computed for.
x-doc.title_zh: 计算盈亏所针对的钱包地址。

x-doc.desc_en: Start of the time bucket, as a Unix timestamp in seconds.
x-doc.title_zh: 该时间分桶的起点，Unix 时间戳（秒）。

x-doc.desc_en:
Cumulative realized PnL up to this bucket.
[⚠️Note:源码未声明盈亏金额的货币单位，待研发确认。]
x-doc.title_zh:
截至该分桶的累计已实现盈亏。
[⚠️批注:源码未声明盈亏金额的货币单位，待研发确认。]

x-doc.desc_en: Realized PnL series, one point per time bucket.
x-doc.title_zh: 已实现盈亏序列，每个时间分桶一个数据点。

x-doc.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
x-doc.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

x-doc.desc_en: Short error code identifying the failure category.
x-doc.title_zh: 标识失败类别的简短错误码。

message.example: Internal Server Error. Dome Admins contacted.

x-doc.desc_en: Human-readable explanation of what went wrong.
x-doc.title_zh: 对错误原因的可读说明。

x-doc.heading_zh: 查询钱包已实现盈亏 get_polymarket-wallet-pnl
x-doc.desc_en: Return a wallet's REALIZED profit and loss over a time range at a chosen granularity. Only realized gains from confirmed sells or redeems are counted, so values differ from Polymarket's dashboard, which shows unrealized PnL.
x-doc.description_zh: 按选定粒度返回某钱包在指定时间范围内的「已实现」盈亏。仅计入确认卖出或赎回带来的已实现收益，因此与展示未实现盈亏的 Polymarket 看板数值不同。

BearerAuth.description: Your AIsa API key as a Bearer token.
